name: Thai Pongal (Sri Lanka)
traditions: Boiling rice in new clay pots until it overflows; decorating cattle; kolam designs; family gatherings; thanksgiving prayers.
historicalBackground: Thai Pongal in Sri Lanka follows the same Tamil harvest traditions as in India but with unique Sri Lankan customs and Buddhist influences.
description: Sri Lanka's Tamil harvest festival, where overflowing rice pots symbolize abundance and gratitude for the year's bounty.
